name: OrganizationIdentification
description: OrganizationIdentification schema from TM Forum API

allOf.description: Represents our registration of information used as proof of identity by an organization

issuingAuthority.description: Authority which has issued the identifier (chamber of commerce...)

issuingDate.description: Date at which the identifier was issued

identificationType.description: Type of identification information used to identify the company in a country or internationally
